calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Michele Denise Starr To Perpetuate Testimony Of Michael Wayne Starr By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555) for Petitioner/Moving party Michele Starr.
Andrew Sharp of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), specially appearing for Albay Construction.
Trina M. Clayton of LEWIS BRISBOIS (415-362-2580), for Respondents Cooper Brothers and Harold Smith + Sons.
Suzanne E. Rischman of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), specially appearing for Underground Construction Co.
Peter Soskin of K&L GATES LLP (415-882-8046), specially appearing for Crane Co.
Jamie Martinez of CMBG3 LAW LLC (415-957-2300), appearing for defendant Armstrong International, Inc.
Abigail Adams of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (415) 527-2803, appearing for Respondent Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.
Nicole E. Gage of TUCKER ELLIS LLP (415-617-2015), appearing for Other Spirax Sarco, Inc.
Stephen Harrington of CLAPP MARONEY (650-989-5400), specially appearing for University Mechanical.
Carmen Santana of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213-955-1150), appearing for Respondent Fluor Corporation via Court Call.

PETITIONER MICHELE STARR's Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of Michael Wayne Starr By Videotaped Deposition

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted with additional conditions agreed by Counsel: The Petition of Michele Denise Starr to Perpetuate Testimony of Michael Wayne Starr by Videotaped Deposition is granted in part and denied in part. The petition is denied as to Sequoia Ventures Inc. as there is no proof of service on file demonstrating it was served with the petition and notice of the hearing. Petitioner has withdrawn her petition as to Fluor Corporation (Reply at 1.) The petition is granted as to all other prospective defendants named in the petition. The Court finds that the discovery requested may prevent a failure or delay of justice. (CCP 2035.050(a).) The Court did not consider the joinders of Temporary Plant Cleaners or Cooper Brothers to Defendants Fluor Corporation and Spirax Sarco, Inc.'s Opposition because they did not conform to the filing deadline under Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 1005(b). The deposition may not be used in any future survival action but may be used in any future wrongful death action. Deposition will commence between September 9, 2019 - October 21, 2019 absent good cause shown. Brayton Purcell will provide all treating medical records to all parties within 5 days of receiving them up through the conclusion of the deposition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: S. Le. Court reporter: Kelly Roemer CSR #6435 of Aiken Welch (Tel: 877-451-1580 Email: kroemer@aikenwelch.com). (503/CML)
